The '''Karsten Moon''' was the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]]. The [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] [[Karsten High Port]], and the consular offices of the reigning [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] government, were located on it, as well as illegal processing plants of the drug [[ji rikknit]].

{{Moon-stub}}
